items.problem: lian workflow coverage is implemented, but successful same-commit GitHub Actions execution has not been observed through the available connector evidence.
items.rootCause: The repository previously targeted bassam/master and the current connector exposes no authoritative push-run result for the latest lian SHA.
implemented: All critical workflows now trigger on lian
A dedicated same-commit lian workflow exists
All aggregators remain fail-closed
acceptance: Completed successful jobs are observed for the exact immutable lian commit
Job logs show governance, contracts, typecheck, build, tests, Go, and security checks passed
Required checks are enforced by GitHub ruleset or branch protection

items.problem: DSH registries are structurally reconciled, but runtime readiness remains unverified for the current commit.
items.rootCause: Historical evidence had been promoted to runtime language without same-commit proof.
implemented: Canonical merged capability registry
Derived manifest and surface ownership
Historical evidence marked HISTORICAL_NOT_SAME_COMMIT
Runtime and screen readiness remain false
acceptance: Typecheck and manifest guard pass
Same-commit runtime journey evidence is generated
Readiness claims are promoted only after runtime proof

items.problem: Required commands were changed to fail closed and the DSH host port was corrected; CI execution must confirm tool availability and command success.
items.rootCause: Diagnostic wrappers and required gates had shared false-success behavior.
implemented: Playwright, Storybook, Loki, Markdown, performance, and bundle checks propagate failures
performance:api:quick targets http://localhost:58080/dsh/health
A registered guard prevents regression
acceptance: Required-command integrity guard passes
Every required binary is installed or the workflow fails explicitly
No required check returns zero after a failed tool invocation

items.problem: lian protection, required checks, same-commit CI, and independent reviewers are not proven.
items.rootCause: These controls require live GitHub configuration and independent identities, not repository declarations.
implemented: Snapshot now targets lian
All unproven controls remain NOT_PROVEN
High-risk closure remains forbidden
acceptance: Branch protection or ruleset verified
Required checks verified
Independent reviewer identities verified
Same-commit successful CI verified

items.problem: All active DSH contracts are registered with explicit client strategies; generated and subset drift checks require execution.
items.rootCause: Contract activation, generated clients, adapters, and CI had evolved independently.
implemented: Active contract registry
Primary, secondary subset, parent subset, and manual adapter strategies
Detection of unregistered active contracts and shard operations absent from primary
Read-only catalog generated-client check
acceptance: Every active contract passes OpenAPI parsing
Every shard operation exists in primary contract
Every generated client contains its operations
Every manual adapter is route and consumer verified

items.problem: The client store, cart, serviceability, checkout, and WLT payment-selection flow was rebuilt to remove fake local behavior; it still requires typecheck, build, tests, and device/runtime verification.
items.rootCause: Donor-replica UI had replaced backend truth with seeded addresses, simulated maps, local calculations, dead controls, hardcoded areas, and unsafe casts.
implemented: Removed random and seeded address/map success
Removed localStorage address truth
Removed hardcoded sana checkout area
Removed local cart total and WLT amount calculations
Removed heuristic product units and modified price references
Removed dead buttons and unsafe fulfillment casts
Required real serviceability success before delivery checkout
Derived store area from live store response
Kept unsupported WLT methods disabled
Added a lian CI anti-regression guard
acceptance: Typecheck, build, unit tests, and client-commerce guard pass
Authenticated client can add, update, remove, clear, service-check, create checkout intent, receive WLT COD reference, create order, and open tracking
Negative authorization, out-of-area, stale cart, invalid coupon, and network failures are verified
Android device and control-panel readback are verified on the same commit

items.problem: No governed authenticated address-book contract, repository, database model, or map-provider boundary exists.
items.rootCause: A local seeded screen previously masked the absence of the full-stack capability.
acceptance: Product Truth defines address ownership and retention
Authenticated CRUD contract and database constraints exist
Map provider is governed through Providers and Platform Control
Checkout can select a verified address and service-area result
PII, permission, audit, deletion, and negative tests pass

items.problem: WLT truth is now evidence-safe, but DSH-to-WLT mutation idempotency and complete runtime journeys are not fully verified.
items.rootCause: Implementation readiness, simulator results, and production authorization had been conflated; some DSH financial calls do not visibly enforce a uniform idempotency header.
implemented: WLT remains the only financial truth owner
Runtime and production mutation claims reset to false
Production provider remains fail-closed
Client UI no longer calculates WLT amounts
acceptance: Every DSH-to-WLT mutation has correlation and idempotency keys
Duplicate, replay, retry, timeout, out-of-order, and partial-failure tests pass
COD, refund, commission, settlement, payout, and reconciliation journeys pass
Production provider remains blocked until independent finance, security, release, and provider evidence

items.problem: app-partner, app-captain, app-field, control-panel, and remaining app-client capabilities still require the same deep dead-control, contract, permission, persistence, readback, and runtime audit.
items.rootCause: Static binding and historical evidence were previously treated as broad runtime readiness.
acceptance: Every required UI control has an end-to-end binding
Every excluded surface has a Product Truth reason
Negative and permission paths pass
No local commercial, operational, identity, workforce, or financial truth remains
Cross-surface readback is verified on the same commit
